infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ScreenSense uses your location to recommend nearby places based on your current mood and stress level.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: ScreenSense uses your location to recommend nearby places based on your current mood and stress level.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: ScreenSense reads sleep and heart rate data to improve stress predictions.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: ScreenSense does not write health data.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: ScreenSense uses motion data to detect activity levels.

plugins.photosPermission: ScreenSense uses your photo library so you can set a profile picture.
